  "findings": [
    "Missing pipe alignment guides near expansion loops",
    "Risk of piping buckling, squirm, or lateral deflection under thermal expansion"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install standard pipe alignment guides at specified distances from the expansion loop",
    "Inspect piping and joints for signs of stress, deformation, or leakage"
  ],
  "rationale": "According to MSS SP-58 and standard piping design, expansion loops require properly spaced alignment guides to ensure the thermal expansion is directed axially into the loop rather than causing lateral buckling or joint failure. Operating without these guides is a severe non-compliance that risks catastrophic piping failure.",
  "references": [
    "MSS SP-58",
    "Project support standards"
  ]
